hooks.name: UAT knowledge update on test save
hooks.description: When a test spec file is saved, remind the agent to run the affected tests and update the UAT steering knowledge.

action.prompt: A Playwright test file was just saved. Run the affected test with `cd frontend && npx playwright test {saved_file} --project=desktop --workers=1 --reporter=list` to verify it passes. If it passes, update .kiro/steering/uat-system.md with the current status. If it fails, diagnose the issue using the patterns in the steering file.
